/opt/spack/var/spack/environments/anacin_spack_env/.spack-env/view/bin/mpicxx -fPIC   -shared -Wl,-soname,libcsmpi.so -o libcsmpi.so CMakeFiles/csmpi.dir/src/csmpi.cpp.o CMakeFiles/csmpi.dir/src/configuration.cpp.o CMakeFiles/csmpi.dir/src/runtime.cpp.o CMakeFiles/csmpi.dir/src/callstack.cpp.o  /opt/spack/var/spack/environments/anacin_spack_env/.spack-env/view/lib/libboost_mpi.a /opt/spack/var/spack/environments/anacin_spack_env/.spack-env/view/lib/libboost_serialization.a
